/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libbasic.so -o libbasic.so CMakeFiles/basic.dir/ColorRGB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basic.dir/Coordinate3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basic.dir/InversionSampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basic.dir/Randomizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basic.dir/Sampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/basic.dir/SphericCoordinate3D.cpp.o  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
